analysis_result: 108 tumors underwent methylation profiling (Methylation column = 'X' in MOESM4). All 108 tumors in the Clinical Data sheet have Methylation = 'X', meaning every tumor in the cohort was profiled.
denominator_used: N = 108 ; definition: rows with non-null Tumor_ID in the 'Clinical Data' sheet of 41467_2023_38432_MOESM4_ESM.xlsx
assumptions_made: Filtered Clinical Data to rows with non-null Tumor_ID to obtain the 108-sample cohort; 'X' in the Methylation column indicates methylation profiling was performed; the Methylation column contains only the literal string 'X' (no trailing whitespace) and NaN
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
   - File: 41467_2023_38432_MOESM4_ESM.xlsx, sheet 'Clinical Data'
   - Shape: 108 rows x 15 columns
   - Relevant columns: Tumor_ID, Methylation

B. COHORT DEFINITION
   - Filter 1: Tumor_ID non-null -> N = 108
   - Final analytic cohort: 108 tumors

C. VARIABLE CODING
   - Outcome variable: Methylation column (values: 'X' indicates profiled, NaN indicates not profiled)
   - value_counts(dropna=False) of Methylation: {'X': 108}
   - Unique values (repr): only 'X' (no whitespace variants)

D. COMPUTATION
   - Numerator: count where Methylation == 'X' -> 108
   - Denominator: total tumors with non-null Tumor_ID -> 108
   - Code: (df_108['Methylation'] == 'X').sum() = 108

E. RESULT
   - 108 of 108 tumors (100%) underwent methylation profiling.

F. CAVEATS
   - The entire cohort of 108 tumors in MOESM4 has Methylation = 'X', consistent with the paper's description of a methylation-profiled cohort. No tumors are missing methylation data in this table.
